$schema: CaseLoad Select Core Chassis · Phase 7 Snippets v1
description: Text snippets for manual conversation replies. Saved in GHL Conversations > Snippets tab. All 8 created as Type: Text. No email snippets in Phase 7.

snippets.name: fee_question_reply
snippets.trigger: Lead asks about cost before booking
snippets.body: Our consultations are flat-fee. The retainer amount depends on the scope of your matter and will be confirmed during our consultation. There are no hidden charges.

snippets.name: consult_booking_reply
snippets.trigger: Lead asks how to book or requests a meeting
snippets.body: I'd be happy to set up a time. You can book directly at {{custom_values.calendar.consult_url}}, choose any time that works for you. If you prefer, reply here and I can help find a slot.
snippets.compliance_note: No em dash. Calendar link uses custom value token.

snippets.name: language_english_reply
snippets.trigger: Lead asks whether the firm works in English
snippets.body: We work in English and are happy to assist you in that language throughout your matter.

snippets.name: language_portuguese_reply
snippets.trigger: Lead asks whether the firm works in Portuguese
snippets.body: Trabalhamos com clientes de lingua portuguesa e podemos atende-lo em portugues durante todo o processo.
snippets.implementation_note: Accented characters entered as ASCII approximations for Windows CP1252 compatibility. Replace with proper diacritics (língua, atendê-lo, português) if GHL displays them correctly.

snippets.name: language_spanish_reply
snippets.trigger: Lead asks whether the firm works in Spanish
snippets.body: Trabajamos con clientes de habla hispana y podemos atenderle en espanol durante todo el proceso.
snippets.implementation_note: Accented characters entered as ASCII approximations. Replace with proper diacritics (español) if GHL displays them correctly.

snippets.name: conflict_check_pending_reply
snippets.trigger: Conflict check initiated, lead is waiting
snippets.body: Thank you for your inquiry. Before we can proceed, we need to complete a brief conflict-of-interest check. This is a standard step and we will follow up within one business day to confirm next steps.

snippets.name: out_of_jurisdiction_reply
snippets.trigger: Lead matter is outside the firm's service area
snippets.body: Thank you for reaching out. Based on the details you have shared, this matter falls outside the jurisdictions we currently serve. We are not able to assist, but the Law Society Referral Service at 1-800-268-8326 can connect you with a lawyer in the right region.
snippets.compliance_note: LSO referral number included per LSO Rule 4.2-1 decline guidance. No outcome promises. No reason that implies legal advice given.

snippets.name: missed_call_recovery_reply
snippets.trigger: Lead called but no one answered; manual follow-up
snippets.body: Hi {{contact.first_name}}, we missed your call and want to make sure you get the help you need. You can reach us at {{custom_values.firm.phone}} or start your inquiry here: {{custom_values.intake.url}}
snippets.implementation_note: Merge tags entered via JavaScript setValue (GHL's {{ trigger opens a merge tag picker that intercepts keyboard input). Verify tokens resolve correctly during P8 QA.

implementation_notes: All 8 snippets created via GHL Conversations > Snippets tab (Add Text Snippet). Type: Text for all.
GHL has no snippet API endpoint. These are UI-only resources included in the snapshot export.
Snippets with merge tags (consult_booking_reply, missed_call_recovery_reply) require the corresponding Custom Values to be populated at sub-account onboarding before they resolve correctly.
Language snippets (PT/ES) use ASCII approximations for accented characters. Review during P8 QA and update in-place if GHL renders diacritics correctly.

The missed_call_recovery_reply snippet body was set via JavaScript (document.querySelector + native value setter + input event dispatch) because typing {{ in GHL's SMS textarea activates a merge tag picker that intercepts subsequent keystrokes. This is a known GHL UI behaviour.

Review automation (J12 two-step sequence) is handled via email templates J9_review_request_email and J12_review_followup_email (Phase 6) and the J12_review_request_sms (Phase 5 workflow inline). Snippets are for manual reply use only, not automated sequences.
next_phase: P8 — QA pass (10 scenarios per spec). P4 and P5 remain parked pending webhook URL from deployed CaseLoad Screen endpoint.
